description_long: This shotgun features a robust, industrial design with a predominantly metallic body accented by a deep red casing on the upper receiver and rear section. The barrel is encased in a perforated silver heat shield, and a thick, coiled orange tube runs along the side, possibly for cooling or energy transfer. The grip is black and angular, positioned below a compact receiver with visible mechanical details and warning labels. The front end is reinforced and slightly flared, while the rear section is solid and streamlined, lacking a traditional stock. Blue and metallic details, as well as warning symbols, add to its high-tech, utilitarian appearance.
description: A heavy, industrial shotgun with a red and metallic body, perforated barrel shield, and a prominent orange coil running along its side.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red upper casing, perforated barrel shield, orange coil, and black grip with visible warning labels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin barrel openings, orange coil symmetry, and the compact, reinforced muzzle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the open section of the red casing, more of the orange coil, and the mechanical receiver details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the solid red back, the alignment of the barrels, and the angular grip beneath.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a perforated heat shield and reinforced muzzle; no visible double-barrel configuration
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
